overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing first-person driving through a rainy neon-lit futuristic city at night. The vehicle navigates through commercial districts, underpasses, and tunnels with heavy atmospheric effects and cyberpunk aesthetics.

events.description: vehicle accelerates from stationary position and begins moving through the plaza
exits covered plaza area onto open rainy street with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: starting vehicle and driving away from commercial plaza with large illuminated billboards

notable_agents.action: walking along the plaza near the illuminated billboards

entered.detail: large wall with multiple glowing advertisements and anime-style posters in purple and white
wet reflective concrete surface of the pedestrian plaza
tall pole with bright overhead light illuminating the rain

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a covered commercial plaza with large illuminated billboards displaying anime-style advertisements. The vehicle starts moving from a stationary position, driving over wet reflective concrete. Pedestrians walk near the billboards on the left as the vehicle transitions from the sheltered plaza onto the open rainy street.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy city street with neon signage and intersections

events.description: navigating through intersection with crosswalk markings visible
approaching and entering concrete underpass with steep retaining walls

agents.ego_description: driving through wet city streets, navigating intersections and approaching an underpass with concrete walls

notable_agents.action: red car moving slowly or parked on the street ahead

entered.detail: steep concrete wall with metal railings and horizontal lines
illuminated commercial sign glowing in the distance

segments.scene_description: Driving through rain-soaked city streets with neon reflections on the asphalt. The vehicle passes a red car ahead and navigates an intersection. Concrete retaining walls line the right side as the vehicle approaches a dark underpass entrance, transitioning from the open plaza environment to enclosed urban infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass with steep walls and overhead lighting

events.description: entering darker underpass area with artificial overhead lighting replacing neon street lights
slight steering adjustment while maintaining speed through the enclosed corridor

agents.ego_description: driving through enclosed concrete underpass with high angled walls on both sides, protected from the rain

entered.detail: steep angled concrete wall with drainage grates and horizontal construction lines
steep angled concrete wall with geometric patterns and metal fixtures
series of bright street lamps mounted along the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow concrete underpass with steep angled walls on both sides, providing shelter from the heavy rain. Overhead lights illuminate the wet asphalt road ahead. The environment is devoid of pedestrians and other vehicles, creating an enclosed, tunnel-like atmosphere distinct from the open neon-lit streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with commercial buildings and palm trees

events.description: exiting underpass back to open street with visible commercial buildings and vegetation
making right turn at intersection with crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: navigating city streets, making a right turn at an intersection, passing commercial buildings and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in yellow raincoat walking along the sidewalk in the rain

entered.detail: building with illuminated windows and commercial signage
tropical palm tree on the sidewalk
concrete dividers and barriers along the road edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens back to rain-soaked city streets with commercial buildings and palm trees visible. The vehicle makes a right turn at an intersection, passing a pedestrian in a yellow raincoat. Concrete barriers line the left side of the road as the vehicle continues through the neon-lit urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: yellow-lit underpass leading to deserted industrial parking area

events.description: entering underpass with warm yellow sodium lighting distinct from previous neon lighting
exiting tunnel into deserted parking area with sparse vegetation and abandoned structures

agents.ego_description: driving through yellow-lit underpass and emerging into a deserted industrial area, slowing to a stop

entered.detail: concrete underpass illuminated by warm yellow sodium vapor lights
empty concrete parking structure with barriers and abandoned appearance
desert vegetation and dry bushes along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a final underpass illuminated by warm yellow sodium lights, contrasting with the previous neon purple and blue lighting. Emerging from the tunnel, the scene transitions to a deserted industrial parking area with dry vegetation and abandoned structures. The vehicle slows as it navigates the empty concrete lot, concluding the drive in this isolated urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-slicked neon metropolis that gradually transitions from a crowded commercial center to a deserted industrial wasteland. It begins in a covered plaza beneath glowing anime billboards, moving over reflective concrete as the vehicle emerges from the shelter into the heavy rain of the open city streets. As the camera navigates through neon-lit intersections and passes other cars, the environment shifts from the open urban sprawl into the oppressive, narrow concrete walls of a dark underpass. The scene then opens back up to rain-soaked streets lined with palm trees and pedestrians before diving into a second tunnel illuminated by warm sodium lights. Finally, the vehicle emerges from the underpass into a stark, isolated industrial parking area characterized by dry vegetation and abandoned structures.
